description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a global before_script to run 'apt -qq update' and 'cabal update', defines a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME with paths .cabal-store and dist-newstyle/cache, sets REDIS_HOST=redis and STORE_DIR=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cabal-store variables, and runs a redis:latest service. Define six test jobs (test:8.0, test:8.10, test:8.2, test:8.4, test:8.6, test:8.8) all in the test stage. The test:8.0 job uses the haskell:8.0 image and runs 'apt -qq install build-essential netbase xz-utils libstdc++-4.9-dev > /dev/null', then 'cabal install --enable-test --only-dep -j', 'cabal build', and 'cabal test'. Each of the other jobs uses the corresponding haskell:<version> image and runs 'cabal --store-dir=$STORE_DIR new-build' followed by 'cabal --store-dir=$STORE_DIR new-test'. No artifacts, rules, or deployments are defined.
